segments.text: 你不知道的趣味新鮮事
Some grains are rice, corn and wheat.
In Taiwan, we use rice to make
We use corn starch to make egg crepes, sauces and fried chicken
We use wheat flour to make noodles for beef noodle soup
and buns for pork belly buns
在台湾,我们用米饭做卤肉饭
用玉米粉做蛋饼、酱料跟炸鸡
还用面粉做牛肉面跟挂包
Scientists say there is a big group of farmers
The farmers help grow 140 billion kilograms of grain every year.
The biggest grain growers in the world are China, the US, India and these farmers.
科学家说有一大群农夫,每一年帮助种植1400亿公斤的穀物。
种最多粮食的是中国、美国、印度跟这群农夫。
谷物需要在肥沃的土壤才能长得好
他们在土壤钻洞,让水跟空气进到土里
他们分解树叶跟其他的东西
也會將它們的排泄物混入土裡
You know what these farmers are, right?
你知道這些農夫是什麼,對吧?
它們不是人類哦,是蚯蚓
Earthworms live all over the world
They're helping to grow our food
And they do everything with no arms or legs
And they do everything with no eyes
它们帮助种植粮食,而且它们没有手跟脚,也看不到。
Now, let's eat some of the grain these hardworking earthworms helped grow.
住在泥土里面的蚯蚓对于农作物有非常大的帮助。
because it feeds so many people 因為它可以餵飽很多人
that too, but think about the different ways people use it 是沒錯,但是想想看,有好多種用它的方式
I love noodles 我愛吃麵
me too, and birthday cakes and pizzas 我也是
以及上述ICRT网站和应用程式
你不知道的趣味新鮮事
就是月球的地面發生震動
The moon gets very hot during the day
This means it gets a little bigger
The moon gets very cold at night
The moon changes from hot to cold every afternoon
而夜晚,非常寒冷,月球會因此受損,每到下午,月球的氣溫從熱到冷,就會發生月震。
They found very small moonquakes too.
Well, many years ago, the USA left a big rocket part there.
科学家研究,发现月球也会发生一些微小的月阵。
很多年前,美国在月球留下了一大块的火箭零件。
When metal gets very cold, it gets a little smaller.
When metal gets very hot, it gets a little bigger.
The rocket part changes from cold to hot every morning.
它是金屬做的,金屬會熱脹冷縮。
每到早上,火箭零件由冷轉熱,就會發生微小的躍震。
Scientists will take many things to the moon.
When the heat and cold change there, what will happen to these things?
科學家將帶很多東西到月球去研究。
他們會研究,當月球的溫度發生變化的時候,這些東西會發生什麼事呢?
地球有地震,月球也有月震,而且是熱障冷縮造成的。
Oh no, it's an earthquake 糟糕,是地震
No, let's hide under the table 不,來躲到桌子底下
And it's getting bigger 還更大了
I wonder what's happening 我想知道發生了什麼事
The TV says it's the biggest earthquake in 10 years.
電視上說這是十年來最大的地震。
My books are all on the floor.
It must be because of the shaking.
一定是因為震動的關係。
What happens when the moon gets very hot?
When is the moon very cold?
What makes the very small moonquakes happen?
不止你不知道的趣味新鮮事
Many people have cats or dogs
These animals are cute and friendly
What other animals are cute and friendly?
還有哪一些動物又可愛又友善呢?
They can run up to 50 kilometers an hour
牠們跑得很快,時速可以到50公里
水屯喜欢水跟湿湿的地方,也喜欢游泳,它们很温和,因此很多人养水屯当宠物。
水屯喜欢水跟湿湿的地方,也喜欢游泳,它们很温和,因此很多人养水屯当宠物。
A man in Nantou had two capybaras.
They lived outside in a pen.
A fence kept the capybaras in the pen.
People used a gate to go in and out of the pen.
One day, the gate was open.
The two capybaras ran away, very fast.
他把他们养在室外的围栏里。
有一天,圍欄的門沒關,那兩隻水豚飛快地跑走了。
The man looked for his pets, but he didn't find them.
那個人找不到他的寵物,他們跑去哪裡呢?
The man asked people online for help.
They helped him find one capybara.
But the man cannot find the other capybara.
主人在網路上求助,他們在河的附近找到一隻,但是找不到另外一隻水豚。
熱愛自由,動物似乎也一樣。
对,我记得你上一只狗叫什么名字
Did you try to find him?
Yes, but he ran too fast
For me, if I want a pet, I'd like to have fish
我的话,假如我要养宠物,我会养鱼
How many capabaras did the man lose?
It's time for News for Kids!
你不知道的趣味新鮮事
Some sugar-free chewing gums can be healthy.
They make your teeth whiter, calm you, and stop bad breath.
有一些無糖口香糖很健康
當你把口香糖吐完之後
有一些人把口香糖吐在地上
攪過的口香糖又黏又難看
明亮的颜色,他的照片很小,
很多人问求特别的牙齿牙齿照片。
英国艺术家Ben Wilson,用鲜艳的颜色在口香糖上做画。
他的作品很小,也很有趣。
很多人都跟他要他的艺术作品。
The Millennium Bridge is in London.
每天有上万人走伦敦的千禧桥,
Many of Wilson's chewing gum pictures will go in the trash.
He's fighting to keep them safe.
但是千禧桥的作品不足以保护,
清洗橋需要清理,許多Wilson的作品都會被丟進垃圾桶,所以他正在爭取保留。
藝術家用吃過的口香糖黏在橋面上,然後塗上顏色,變成一幅幅小小的畫作。
You have so many pictures at home 你家里有好多画
Believe it or not, I painted all of them 信不信有你,他们都是我画的
That is hard to believe 真难以置信
I never knew you were an artist 我从不知道你是艺术家
No, I only tried to be one 没有啦,我试着做个艺术家而已
So you like bright colors, don't you?
所以你喜歡鮮豔的顏色,對吧?
Yeah, yellow and orange are my favorite colors 對,黃色跟橘色是我最喜歡的
No, I paint when I feel bad 不,心情不好的時候才畫
What needs cleaning in this story?
谁听 还有文字稿哦
News for kids, news for kids
你不知道的趣味新鮮事
Sammy幫助孤單的孩子交朋友
She gives buddy benches to schools, what are they?
Well, buddy means friend, and benches are long seats for two or three people.
Buddy benches are seats for friends.
他捐好朋友长板凳给学校。
Bench是两到三个人可以坐的板凳。
好朋友板凳,就是用来交朋友的。
When a kid feels lonely, she sits on one.
Other kids know she needs a friend.
They can sit with her or play with her.
小朋友感到孤单的时候,可以坐在好朋友长板凳上。
其他的小朋友就会知道他需要朋友,
会跟他坐在一起,跟他玩,成为朋友。
Sammy learned about buddy benches when she was 8 years old.
She wanted a bench for her school.
She wanted one that was kind to the earth.
Sammy 八岁的时候,知道好朋友长板凳,他希望他的学校也有。
他也希望能够对地球友善。
A company takes plastic bottle caps to make plastic benches.
So, Sammy asked everyone for bottle caps.
有一家公司把塑膠瓶蓋做成長板凳,所以Sammy跟人家要瓶蓋,
收集多達725公斤,然後做了3個長板凳。
She didn't stop at three benches, she gave more than two hundred benches in the USA and one in Africa, and she's still helping.
Sammy現在14歲,她收集的瓶蓋在美國,坐了超過兩百個這樣的椅子,還有一個在非洲。
Let's have buddy benches in Taiwan, and help lonely kids find friends.
坐在好朋友長板凳上,可以讓人知道你需要朋友。
I need to go to work in 20 minutes.
But I can sit with you for a while.
但我可以跟你坐一会儿。
So, you wanted to play football?
所以你是想玩美式足球?
It's hard to play it all by myself.
You're right, I'd want to play football with a friend, too.
你說得對,我也會想跟朋友一起打球。
How many buddy benches did Sami give to schools?
The answers are all available on the ICRT website and app
你不知道的趣味新鮮事
You can swim in the ocean
You can relax on the sand
You can watch the sun go down
Don't park your car by the ocean
你可以游泳,在沙灘上放鬆,看夕陽,但是要注意喔!
有一天有一個家庭開車到苗栗外埔海灘
他们把两台车停在海边,就去晚了
They forgot about the ocean tides
At high tide, the ocean's water goes up 3 or 4 meters in Miaoli
At low tide, it goes down
A dry place on the beach can be underwater a few hours later
外埔海灘漲潮的時候會上升三或四公尺
海邊乾燥的地方就會被海水淹沒
他们和其他的人一起退车子,但是只来得及救一台车。
他们和其他的人一起退车子,但是只来得及救一台车。
他们和其他的人一起退车子,但是只来得及救一台车。
他们和其他的人一起退车子,但是只来得及救一台车。
他们和其他的人一起退车子,但是只来得及救一台车。
他们和其他的人一起退车子,但是
他们和其他的人一起退车子,
但是只来得及救一台车。
他们和其他的人一起退车子,但是只来得及救一台车。
So, when you go to the beach, be careful about high tide and your car
汽車停得離大海太近,漲潮時就被海水吞沒了
I really miss our time at the beach last week
我真想念我們上星期在海灘的時光
Yeah, we had lots of fun, didn't we?
對啊,我們玩得可開心了
I laughed so hard when Tom's car went down in the ocean.
湯姆的车子掉进海里时,我笑死了。
And he had to go underwater to push it.
他还得到水下面去推车。
He totally forgot about the ocean tides.
Yeah, none of us saw the water coming.
对啊,我们也没有人看到海水来了。
I'm thinking of going back there next week 我想下个星期就地重游
We can relax on the sand and watch the sunset 好主意!
我们可以在沙滩上尝阳看夕阳
What made the ocean water go up?
Why did the family push the cars?

News for kids, news for kids
你不知道的趣味新鮮是
am looking at a wedding picture in the newspaper
Her wedding dress is beautiful too
我正在看報紙上的結婚照
可是這張照片是在哪裡拍的呢?
很多新人會在美美的地方拍婚紗照
但是,這張照片居然是在一座垃圾場拍的
It's where a lot of garbage goes
Old food, old clothes, and many other things we don't want
Dump 是垃圾場,也就是垃圾 garbage 集中的地方
The bride and groom went to a dump in Nanto
It has a very big mountain of garbage.
It gets 50,000 kilograms of new garbage every day.
這對新人去南投垃圾場拍照。
那裡有一座很大的垃圾山。
每天有五萬公斤的垃圾倒入這個垃圾場。
There is nowhere good to take it.
The bride wanted to show their friends this.
She wanted them to make less garbage at her wedding.
台灣有太多的垃圾,都沒有什麼好地方可以拿去丟。
新娘想給她朋友看,讓他們知道她要在她的婚禮上減少垃圾。
Now, a picture of the bride, the groom, and the garbage mountain is on the internet.
Now, the bride wants everyone to make less garbage.
這對新人不惜在垃圾堆上拍結婚照,好提醒大家減少垃圾。
Wow, that's quite a lot of garbage.
I know, I don't understand how we can produce so much trash.
我知道,我也搞不懂我們怎麼會製造這麼多的垃圾
You must cook everyday, 你一定每天做菜
I do cook a lot, 我是做很多吃的
People often throw away a lot of things when cooking
做飯時,常常會扔掉一堆東西
That's true, plastic wrapping, egg shells, old vegetable leaves
是真的,塑膠包裝啦,蛋殼啦,老掉的蔬菜葉
我也會扔食物,especially leftover dishes
是啊,新鮮的東西比較好
Do you throw away many things?
The answers are all available on the ICRT website and app.

你不知道的趣味新鮮事
When we break something, sometimes we can glue the parts together again.
膠水很實用,我們做東西用得到,或是打破東西要黏起來都用得到。
But there's one thing bad about glue,
it's hard to take things apart again.
但是膠水有個缺點,一旦把東西黏在一起,就很難再分開。
Scientists in Japan made a new glue.
It's strong, and it lets us take things apart.
We can use it again and again too.
日本科學家發明了一種新的膠水。
它很黏,但是要拆開也可以,就能反覆使用。
One light makes it strong, then it holds things together very well.
The other light makes it weak, then we can take things apart.
這個澆水利用兩種光,一種可以讓澆水變黏,另一種可以讓它失去黏性。
Sometimes we can use these things again, sometimes our city can recycle them.
This glue helps us waste less.
这样我们就能重复利用东西,也可以回收,减少浪费。
这种粘贴也很容易改变。
可能你把你最喜欢的歌手的照片粘贴在桌子上,
但现在你又有最新的最喜欢。
使用一盏灯,再见,最舊的最喜欢,使用另一盏灯,
这种粘胶让人容易变来变去。
你之前可能在牆上貼了某一位個性的照片
然後用另外一種光照社
該黏的時候黏,也可以讓它不黏
我想看能不能做成個新東西
可是我很喜歡那架飛機
No, you can't, it won't be the same
你做不到,它就是不一樣了
Yes, it will, 是一樣的
All I need to do is glue the wings back
我只需要把翅膀黏回去
You see, this glue is strong
I don't think it can hold the wings for long.
我覺得它沒有辦法黏住翅膀多久。
Do you like to take things apart?
Who made the new glue in Japan?
What makes the new glue strong?
The answers are all available on the ICRT website and app

你不知道的趣味新鮮事
There's a great dog named Axel.
He lives with a boy named Gabriel
狗狗是人類的好朋友嗎?
有一隻狗叫Axel,他跟一個叫Gabriel的小男孩,還有Gabriel的爸爸媽媽住在一起。
One morning, Axel woke up Gabriel's mom and dad with his paws.
有一天早上,Axel用腳掌,不停地拍Gabriel的爸爸媽媽,要咬醒他們。
It was five o'clock in the morning.
They thought he wanted to go outside, but he didn't want to go out of the house.
那时候才早上五点,他们以为Axel想出去玩,但是他并不是要出门。
He pawed and pawed Gabriel's bedroom door.
He did not leave Gabriel's door.
Gabriel's mom and dad went into Gabriel's bedroom
Something was the matter with Gabriel
He needed to go to the hospital
Gabriel的父母進到他的房間,發現兒子不對勁,需要趕緊送醫院
Gabriel's parents called the emergency number
The ambulance took Gabriel to the hospital
医生找到了原因,把他救了回来。
Gabriel的父母说,Axel帮忙救他们的儿子一命。
医生找到了原因,把他救了回来。
所以,他们是狗人的最好的朋友吗?
聰明的狗狗懂得如何替小主人求救
I ran a full marathon this morning.
我今天早上跑了全馬拉松
I needed to exercise 我需要运动
Not that much 不能运动那么多
Anyway, you should go see a doctor now 无论如何 你现在应该去看医生
No, no, no, I don't want to go to the hospital 不要不要 我不要去医院
I'll take you there 我带你去
You need emergency care 你需要紧急医疗
And I hate the emergency room.
All I need is to go to my bedroom and sleep.
我需要的只是去臥室睡覺。
Gabriel's mom and dad one morning a three o'clock b five o'clock c seven o'
clock question number two why did Axel wake up Gabriel's mom and dad a to go outside b to help Gabriel c to play
question number three what did Axel do at Gabriel's bedroom door a pod it b opened it c sat down
The answers are all available on the ICRT website and app.

不止你不知道的趣味新鮮事
I see RT's news for kids
Find somewhere I can't see you
你去找个我看不到你的地方
Ready or not, here I come
Hide and seek is so fun
How about playing hide and seek with an elephant?
Right, how about playing with a mouse?
跟大象一起玩做迷藏太容易了,但是跟一隻老鼠玩就很困難。
How about playing hide and seek with a cat?
They are very good climbers, and their fur helps them hide.
那跟貓一起玩躲貓貓呢?
他們很會爬,還有保護色。
Taiwan has a big cat called the Formosan clouded leopard.
People have looked for it for 150 years.
台灣有一種大型貓科動物,叫做台灣雲豹,他們很會躲。
人們已經花了150年找他們。
The National Taiwan Museum made a kids book.
It's about the Formosan clouded leopard.
It's written in Taiwanese and Mandarin.
嗯哼,Hide and Seek 国立台湾博物馆,分别以中文跟台语,制作了一本关于台湾云暴的绘本,书名就叫做作弥藏。
Now, it's on an important kids' book list, the White Ravens 2023 list.
People around the world use it to find books for kids.
这本书入选2023年的白乌鸦奖,很多人都从得奖名单里面,帮小孩找适合的童书。
云报》行踪隐秘,让人类怎么也找不到它。
我小時候不喜歡玩捉迷藏
I never knew where to hide
我都不知道要躲去哪裡
We lived in an old house
All the hiding places were dark
所有躲藏的地方都很黑
But I didn't want to be found
Once I even climbed up a tree
我有一次甚至爬到樹上
That's hard for a little kid
But I stayed on the tree
每個人都在找我 但是我就待在樹上
For a long time 待了很久嗎
Yes, because I didn't know how to come down
對 因為我不知道怎麼爬下樹
Have you ever played hide and seek?

你不知道的趣味新鮮是
What kind of music is this?
Do you know what other animals like classical music?
很多人喜欢古典音乐,有一些狗狗也喜欢,但你知道还有哪一些动物喜欢古典音乐吗?
紐西蘭有一群有名的音樂家
他們多半在富麗堂皇的地方表演
他們之中有一些人在洋雞場
對著成千上萬隻的雞演奏古典音樂
是的,音樂家開始演奏的時候
音樂家也很開心為他們演奏
雞不喜歡大聲的音樂,也不喜歡鼓
所以这首喂鸡写的曲子很平和
这些音乐家为什么要喂鸡演奏呢?
因为鸡农希望这些动物过得好
现在,鸡农会继续播放音乐给它们听
乌也喜欢音乐,而这群纽西兰音乐家喜欢演奏音乐给鸡听
我每次聽都覺得很安寧
I like some of it, not all
小提琴獨奏就讓我想睡覺
What kind of music do you enjoy?
我喜歡流行音樂,比如說女神卡卡或是畢昂斯的歌
I like them too 我也喜歡
Sometimes I play pop songs on YouTube when I'm doing house chores
有時候我做家事會播YouTube的流行歌曲

不止你不知道的趣味新鮮事
Islands have water all around them
Oceans, seas and many lakes and rivers
很多的海洋、湖泊跟河流上都有島嶼
Do islands float like a boat?
Most islands are connected to the earth
And some of them float too much
島嶼會跟船一樣浮在水面上嗎?
大多數的島嶼都連著地殼,不會浮在水上,台灣島也不會
但是一些小島確實會浮在水面上,還漂浮得很厲害
There's a big floating island in a small lake.
It's in Wisconsin, a state in the USA.
The wind in the trees makes the island move.
美國威斯康星州的一座小湖泊
島上的樹跟風會讓它移動
Almost every year, the island floats too close to a bridge.
幾乎每一年,這座島都會太靠近橋,堵住了船隻,從橋底下通過的通道,又沒有其他的路線可以到湖的另一邊。
So, about 25 boats come at one time.
They push the island away from the bridge.
于是二十五艘船会一起开过来,把漂浮岛推开。
Why don't people make the island into smaller islands?
Well, many kinds of animals live there.
So, Wisconsin says people cannot do this.
那为什么不把这座岛弄成多个小岛呢?
因为岛上有很多动物欺袭,所以不可以这么做。
It's a good thing Taiwan doesn't float, we don't have enough boats to push it.
一座会漂浮的小岛对当地居民造成了困扰。
Could you imagine living on an island?
We are living on an island, 我们是住在岛上。
No, a small island in a lake 不,是湖上的小岛
Oh, like Lalu Island in Sun Moon Lake 像是日月潭的拉鲁岛吗?
Yeah, you could live there and go swimming whenever you want 对啊,你可以住在那里,想游泳随时都可以
So, you have an island for sale 所以你有一座岛要卖
I only have a boat 不是,我只有一艘船
And you plan to visit me on this island by boat 而你打算坐船来岛上看我
Yeah, but I can only do it once every year 但是我每年只能看你一次
Why do boats push the island?
To make trees tall and strong
To let boats go to the lakes other side

很多灯都很可爱,也很漂亮。

每30分钟就有5分钟的灯光秀。

Have you tried the macarons at that dessert shop?
你有吃過那家甜點店的馬卡龍嗎?

沒有,我經常覺得馬卡龍太甜了。
Well, then you should try their bitter chocolate cake.
那你應該嚐嚐他們的苦巧克力蛋糕。
Yeah, I have a weakness for dessert.
I like to have it with tea.

你不知道的趣味新鮮事
Do you know what the Eiffel Tower is?
It's a very tall tower in Paris, France.
Millions of people visit it every year.
Many visitors take the glass elevators to the top floor.
客人可以看到巴黎的美麗景觀
你知道什麼是艾菲爾鐵塔嗎?
它是在法國巴黎的一座高塔
每年都有上百萬人參觀
遊客會搭玻璃電梯到高達276公尺的觀景台
One day, a man named Amir and a woman named Kat were on the top floor.
有一天,一對情侶Amir跟Kat在鐵塔上的觀景台。
On the outside of the tower, another man started climbing up.
有另外一個人在鐵塔外彈爬。
這非常危險,他很有可能會掉下去。
這座升降機沒有倒下,但是人們很擔心,所以艾菲爾鐵塔關閉,升降機安全了,升降機停止了。
幸好龐帕的人沒有掉下去,但是很擔心,所以艾菲爾鐵塔關閉,電梯也停了,直到龐帕的人安全。
Amyre and Kat and the other visitors were stuck on the top floor.
They waited for the elevators to start.
Amyre跟Kat 還有其他的旅客 被困在觀景台
在等待電梯恢復使用的時候
He asked Kat to marry him.
And what happened to the climber?
那攀爬的人後來怎麼樣呢?
消防員阻止他繼續攀爬
It's a bad idea to climb the outside of the Eiffel Tower
But being stuck at the top
在舉世聞名的艾菲爾鐵塔上求婚
What if nobody comes to rescue us?
But we are stuck here now.
但是我們現在被困在這裡了。
I have an idea, let's call 119
Right, why didn't I think of that earlier
對啊,我怎麼剛剛沒有想到
What is true about the Eiffel Tower?
What did Amir do at the tower?
你不知道的趣味新鲜事!
Thor, a man from Denmark, went on a long trip.
He went to every country in the world.
Other people who did this used planes.
But Thor didn't use planes, he wanted to do something new.
来自丹麦的索尔,招访过世界上每一个国家,一共有203个。
通常,大家是坐飞机环游世界,但索尔并没有这么做。
Thor had 650 Taiwan dollars to use every day.
This money was for a place to sleep, food, and taxis, buses, trains, and boats.
梭尔每天有650块台币,花在住宿,食物,基层车,公车,活车,跟船。
He learned what people eat, what they do, where they go, what they think, and more.
索尔到处交朋友,学习不同地方的人吃什么,做什么,想什么,去哪些地方。
Thor had some hard times, because of Covid he was in Hong Kong for two years.
He was on ships in bad weather, another time he got very sick, sometimes he slept outside, but he didn't go home.
但是索爾也有困頓的時候,因為疫情,他被困在香港兩年,也曾經在惡劣的天氣下坐船,也有生病的時候,
有时候还睡在户外,但是他都没有回家。
He learned how Taiwan cares for both its people and other countries.
He said Taiwan has a big heart.
他学到台湾如何照顾人民跟其他的国家。
你这回有什么异想天开的主意?
我要去伊拉克、伊朗和约旦
国家,那些都是回教国家
也是有古老历史的国家
所以你一個人去,因為我是一定不會去的。
Do you like taking a trip abroad?
去顾国民集学前教育署

你不知道的趣味新鮮事
NASA is the USA's space agency
It's job is to learn about space
It has millions and billions of planets
美國太空總署NASA的職責是瞭解外太空。
廣闊的太空,有億萬顆行星,恆星,衛星,還有很多其他的東西。
Astronauts幫助我們學習在宇宙中生活。
幫助我們瞭解太空生活
NASA派他到國際太空站6個月
但是有一顆太空岩石打到了他的太空船
After that, his spaceship didn't work well.
Rubio had no spaceship to fly home in.
He had to wait for a new spaceship from NASA.
But, NASA didn't have a spaceship ready yet.
Rubio had to wait six more months to go home.
他的太空船沒有辦法正常運作,無法回到地球。
Rubio博士必須等待新的太空船。
但是NASA没有预备好的太空船,它要再多等六个多月才能回家。
Rubio said being stuck in space was hard.
He wanted to see his family and friends.
He was stuck in space for 371 days.
That's longer than other US astronauts.
He set a new record by accident.
比其他的美國太空人都還要久
This poor guy 可憐的傢伙
Can you imagine living in space for so many days
你能想像住在太空那麼多天嗎
Well, that's his job 那是他的工作
And there were other astronauts 而且還有別的太空人
If I were him, I would go out and spacewalk every day
如果我是它,我會每天都出去太空漫步
And watch the stars and moon?
It would be boring after just one week 一個星期之後你就會厭煩了
And there are space rocks too 而且還有太空碎石
They may hit you and hurt you 可能會打到你,讓你受傷
Come to think of it, planet Earth is the best place to live.
這麼想來,我們的行星地球還是最好的地方。
No doubt about that,毫無疑問是那樣。
What is the USA's space agency?

不止你不知道的趣味新鮮事
Lots of people have a pet cat.
很多人喜歡貓,也把牠們當寵物。
But when people look at their cat's face, do they know what it's feeling?
Is their cat making a happy face?
Is it making a sad face?
但是人們看著貓咪的臉的時候,他們會知道貓有什麼樣的情緒嗎?
他是在做開心的表情,還是悲傷的表情呢?
People are still learning how to understand the faces cats make.
But now, scientists know cats make many kinds of faces.
人們還在學習如何瞭解貓咪的表情,但是現在科學家知道他們可以做很多種表情。
Scientists studied 53 cats in a cat cafe.
They saw the cats make many faces.
科学家在一间猫咪咖啡厅,研究店里的53只猫,观察这些猫互相靠近的时候有什么表情。
Cats can move their eyes, ears, and whiskers.
They can open their mouths and lick their noses.
猫咪可以动它们的眼睛、耳朵跟胡须,可以张开嘴巴跟舔鼻子。
除了这些之外,猫咪还有快二十种的方式动它们的脸部肌肉。
Scientist learned cats use these ways to make almost 300 faces.
Most of the faces are friendly.
但貓貓也會做出一些憤怒的臉
有些臉是科學家無法理解的
用這些方式,科學家發現
貓咪可以做出幾乎三百種的表情
大多是友善的表情,也有生氣的表情
還有很多科學家還不了解的表情
貓貓可以做出很多種表情
科學家說,貓咪表情豐富,但是人類多半不了解那些表情是什麼意思。
No, when a cat is angry, it would hiss.
不对,猫生气的时候会发丝丝的声。
Since when do you know so much about cats?
They seem to be watching me.
Do you have a pet cat?
How many faces can cats make?

就是將某一件事情做得最多或是最好。

he set a record for teaching social studies the longest.
Paul Duritz 是一所美国中学的老师,他创下教社会科最久的记录。

它是包含历史、人文跟文化的领域。
Well, when he started, he was 23 years old, now he's 76.

他從23歲開始教書,他現在76歲了,一共教了53年。

and he has been at one school for all these years.
他甚至是在同一间学校教书教了53年。

為什麼德瑞茲先生喜歡教社會課呢?

So, when he was 11 years old, he wanted to be a social studies teacher when he grew up.

所以,在他十一歲的時候,就立志成為社會科的老師,現在有一位他的學生也成為了社會科老師。
科老師教統一門學科,教了五十多年,樂此不疲。

History, 歷史,no, too early, 不對,太早了
Oh, then I don't know, I'm bad at history, 那我就不知道了,我的歷史不好

那是因為你是梅西的大球迷

英国有一只14岁的猫Bella,他的葫芦声非常大。
主人Spink先生说,他的声音有时候比电视还大声。

他們想要測量她的聲音。
